projects.name: Money Wrapped
projects.tagline: A cinematic recap of your payments
projects.description: Drop in a payments statement PDF and get a Spotify Wrapped–style cinematic recap of your money — generated entirely in the browser.
highlights: Upload a 1–6 month statement PDF and get a 60-second animated recap of your spending
Privacy-first: parsing and analysis run locally in the browser, nothing is uploaded
Supports Google Pay statements today, with more providers on the way
projects.mediaAlt: Money Wrapped — cinematic recap of your payments

projects.name: TalentAGR Consultancy
projects.tagline: Recruitment platform — hire smarter, grow faster
projects.description: A recruitment consultancy platform connecting job seekers with employers across India. I designed, built, and deployed the full web app — from role-fit job discovery for candidates to pre-screened talent pipelines for enterprises.
highlights: Smart job matching by function, type, city, and industry, with candidate-first screening against active roles
Resume upload, interview prep guidance, and deployment-focused industry training programs
PAN-India coverage with daily vacancy updates, trusted by HDFC, ICICI, Axis, and Kotak Mahindra

projects.name: dbspin
projects.description: A CLI to quickly connect to PostgreSQL databases using pgcli or psql.
highlights: Interactive prompts for environment, tool, port alias, and database
Direct mode with command-line arguments
Visualize query results with interactive Chart.js graphs

projects.name: Text Command Palette
projects.tagline: VS Code-style command palette for text
projects.description: Select any text, press a shortcut, and instantly apply powerful text transformations—without leaving the page.
highlights: Open with Ctrl+K or Cmd+K on any website with text selection
12+ transformations: case conversion, formatting, cleanup, and utilities
Offline-first and lightweight — all processing runs locally in the browser

projects.name: Spotlight Chrome Extension
projects.description: A Mac Spotlight–inspired command palette to search tabs, bookmarks, history, and recently closed tabs—without leaving the keyboard.
highlights: Open with Cmd+Shift+K or Ctrl+Shift+K — shortcut is fully customizable
Search active tabs, recently closed tabs, bookmarks, and browser history in one place
Quick actions to switch tabs, reopen closed ones, or fall back to Google search

projects.name: easybg
projects.description: A curated library of 176+ Tailwind CSS backgrounds—gradients, patterns, mesh, and animated effects. Preview live, copy classes, and drop them into your next project.
highlights: 176+ backgrounds across gradients, geometric, animated, patterns, mesh, and Spider-Man themes
Live preview with one-click copy for Tailwind classes
Built on Tailwind CSS v4 with dark mode and keyboard shortcuts

projects.name: scut
projects.tagline: Run command sequences with one short name
projects.description: Create, list, edit, and run shortcuts for sequences of CLI commands—one short name instead of retyping the same cd … && … && … every time.
highlights: All shortcuts live in one JSON file you edit directly—add a key to create one, delete it to remove
Steps run together in one shell via &&, so an early cd carries forward; extra args append to the last step
Cross-platform across bash, zsh, fish, PowerShell, and cmd, with zero runtime dependencies
